title: pimelea prostrata var. erecta
intro: Pimelea prostrata var. erecta, commonly known as Erect Blue Rutan or Blue Rutan, is a plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The therapeutic actions of Pimelea prostrata var. erecta include wound healing, skin soothing, and antiseptic effects. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Pimelea prostrata var. erecta can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems.
